description: Complete inventory of all context documentation files in .claude/docs

ai.name: AI Integration
ai.description: AI integration documentation including Portkey gateway setup and prompt engineering

documents.name: Portkey AI Gateway Integration
documents.description: Comprehensive guide for integrating Portkey as the AI service abstraction layer. Covers unified API usage, provider auto-selection, cost tracking, and streaming responses.

documents.name: Prompt Engineering Guide
documents.description: Best practices for creating effective prompts and system messages. Includes templates for content generation, data extraction, and cost optimization strategies.

architecture.name: System Architecture
architecture.description: System architecture documentation including performance optimization and service patterns

documents.name: Performance Optimization
documents.description: Detailed performance optimization strategies across build-time, server-side, client-side, network, and database layers with MakerKit-specific optimizations.

documents.name: Service Architecture Patterns
documents.description: Functional service architecture patterns used in the application. Covers feature services, server actions, integration services, and API functions.

documents.name: State Management
documents.description: State management patterns and best practices for managing application state across client and server components.

documents.name: System Design Overview
documents.description: Overall system architecture and design principles for the SlideHeroes platform.

cms.name: CMS & Content Management
cms.description: Payload CMS documentation including configuration patterns, migration system, and troubleshooting

documents.name: Payload CMS Patterns
documents.description: Payload CMS configuration patterns for collections, field types, hooks, access control, and versioning with implementation examples.

documents.name: Content Migration System Guide
documents.description: Comprehensive guide for the content migration system including setup, usage, and best practices.

documents.name: Content Migration Overview
documents.description: Overview of content migration processes and procedures for Payload CMS.

documents.name: Content Migration Troubleshooting
documents.description: Troubleshooting guide for common content migration issues and their solutions.

documents.name: Database Verification & Repair
documents.description: Database integrity checking and repair procedures for Payload CMS data.

documents.name: Detailed Database Repair Guide
documents.description: In-depth guide for database verification and repair with step-by-step procedures.

documents.name: Loading Phase Guide
documents.description: Guide for managing Payload CMS loading phases and initialization sequences.

documents.name: Quiz Relationship Troubleshooting
documents.description: Specific troubleshooting guide for quiz relationship issues in the CMS.

documents.name: WSL Troubleshooting
documents.description: WSL-specific issues and solutions for Payload CMS development environment.

command-examples.name: Command Examples
command-examples.description: Examples of command usage including debug workflows and parallel execution

documents.name: Debug Issue Command Example
documents.description: Example usage of the debug-issue command for systematic debugging.

documents.name: Execute Parallel Command Example
documents.description: Example of executing tasks in parallel for improved performance.

documents.name: Initialize Parallel Command Example
documents.description: Example of initializing parallel processes and workflows.

documents.name: Prime Command Example
documents.description: Example of the prime command for preparing the development environment.

data.name: Data Management
data.description: Data management patterns including database schema, React Query, and Supabase patterns

documents.name: Database Schema Documentation
documents.description: Complete database schema documentation for auth, public, and payload schemas including table structures, relationships, indexes, and TypeScript types.

documents.name: React Query Patterns
documents.description: React Query implementation patterns and best practices including provider configuration, query functions, and SSR/hydration strategies.

documents.name: Supabase Patterns
documents.description: Supabase-specific patterns and best practices for database operations and real-time features.

debugging.name: Debugging & Troubleshooting
debugging.description: Debugging workflows and troubleshooting guides for various system components

documents.name: Debugging System Overview
documents.description: Two-command debugging system using /log-issue and /debug-issue for systematic issue documentation and resolution.

documents.name: Common Debugging Patterns
documents.description: Common debugging patterns and strategies for typical issues encountered in the application.

documents.name: Database Debugging
documents.description: Specific debugging techniques for database-related issues including query analysis and performance troubleshooting.

documents.name: Error Handling Guide
documents.description: Comprehensive error handling strategies and patterns for robust application behavior.

documents.name: GitHub First Issues Guide
documents.description: Guide for creating and managing GitHub issues effectively for bug tracking and feature requests.

documents.name: Integration Debugging
documents.description: Debugging guide for third-party integrations and API connectivity issues.

documents.name: Performance Debugging
documents.description: Performance debugging techniques for identifying and resolving performance bottlenecks.

security.name: Security
security.description: Security patterns including authentication and authorization implementations

documents.name: Authentication Patterns
documents.description: Comprehensive authentication patterns using Supabase Auth covering client/server-side auth, OAuth, MFA, session management, and security best practices.

documents.name: Authorization Patterns
documents.description: Authorization patterns and Row Level Security (RLS) implementation for fine-grained access control.

testing.name: Testing
testing.description: Testing documentation including prioritization plans, templates, and testing fundamentals

documents.name: Unit Testing Prioritization Plan
documents.description: Strategic plan for implementing unit tests with four-phase implementation strategy prioritizing custom business logic.

documents.name: Test Case Template
documents.description: Standard template for creating consistent and comprehensive test cases.

documents.name: Unit Test Checklist
documents.description: Comprehensive checklist for ensuring thorough unit test coverage.

documents.name: Unit Test Tracking Guide
documents.description: Guide for tracking unit test implementation progress and coverage metrics.

documents.name: Testing Fundamentals
documents.description: Core testing principles and patterns including AAA pattern, naming conventions, test structure, and essential patterns for the SlideHeroes codebase.

documents.name: Mocking and TypeScript Testing Guide
documents.description: Comprehensive guide for all mocking strategies and TypeScript-specific testing patterns. Includes Vitest mocking, project-specific mocks (Supabase, server actions, Portkey), and TypeScript compilation fixes.

documents.name: Testing Examples
documents.description: Concrete, working test examples from the SlideHeroes codebase organized by feature type. Includes server actions, React components, AI integrations, and real-world patterns.

documents.name: TypeScript Test Patterns
documents.description: Comprehensive TypeScript patterns for fixing test file compilation errors. Covers common error patterns, action result types, mock patterns, component testing, Supabase mocks, error handling, and best practices specific to the SlideHeroes codebase.

ui.description: UI documentation including component patterns, accessibility, and design systems

documents.description: Component structure patterns for client and server components with real-world examples and best practices.

documents.name: Accessibility Guidelines
documents.description: Accessibility guidelines and WCAG compliance requirements for UI components.

documents.name: Responsive Design Patterns
documents.description: Responsive design patterns and breakpoint strategies for multi-device support.

documents.name: Tailwind CSS Standards
documents.description: Tailwind CSS usage standards and conventions for consistent styling.

documents.name: UI Components Guide
documents.description: Comprehensive guide for working with shadcn UI and Aceternity UI component libraries. Covers usage patterns, installed components, adding new components, and best practices.

utilities.name: Utilities
utilities.description: Utility documentation including git aliases, process flows, and automation scripts

documents.name: Git Aliases
documents.description: Custom git aliases and shortcuts for improved development workflow.

documents.name: Process Flows
documents.description: Application process flows and workflow documentation.

documents.name: Role-Based Implementation
documents.description: Guide for implementing role-based features and access control.

documents.name: UV Single-File Scripts
documents.description: Guide for using UV single-file scripts for utility functions and automation.

documents.name: Enhanced Logger System
documents.description: Comprehensive documentation of the async logger system including architecture, usage patterns, security features, biome linting alignment, and migration guide from console logging.

test-cases.description: Specific test case documentation for individual components and services throughout the application, organized by file path.
